data.description: A framework of 36 AI UX design patterns documented from ChatGPT, Claude, GitHub Copilot, Midjourney, and 50+ shipped AI products. Real examples, code demos, and actionable guidance for designing AI-powered experiences.
data.html:
aiux
PatternsPatternsNewsNewsAuditAuditResourcesResources

AI UX Design Patterns

How the world's best AI products design their experiences, documented, analyzed, and continuously updated.

Patterns used by leading companies

Score your AI interface against 28 proven UX patterns

One-page PDF for design reviews + weekly AI/UX analysis. Unsubscribe anytime.

The AI UX design pattern library for product designers and teams building AI-powered experiences. Each pattern is documented from 3+ real implementations across products like ChatGPT, Claude, GitHub Copilot, Midjourney, Google, and Notion, with examples, code demos, and research-backed guidance you can apply today.

Categories

Contextual Assistance

Offer timely, proactive help and suggestions based on user context, history, and needs.

Human-AI Collaboration
Used by:
GitHub
Google
Notion

Progressive Disclosure

Gradually reveal information, options, or AI features to reduce cognitive load and simplify complex tasks.

Natural Interaction
Used by:
Google
Loom

Human-in-the-Loop

Balance automation with human oversight for critical decisions, ensuring AI augments human judgment.

Human-AI Collaboration
Used by:
Google
Grammarly
OpenAI

Explainable AI (XAI)

Make AI decisions understandable via visualizations, explanations, and transparent reasoning.

Trustworthy & Reliable AI
Used by:
Claude
Hugging
Perplexity

Conversational UI

Design intuitive, engaging, human-like interactions via chat and voice interfaces.

Natural Interaction
Used by:
Microsoft
Siri
Slack

Adaptive Interfaces

Interfaces that learn user behavior and automatically adjust layout and functionality to match individual usage patterns.

Adaptive & Intelligent Systems
Used by:
Duolingo
Netflix
Spotify

Multimodal Interaction

Combine voice, touch, gesture, text, and visual input for natural interaction.

Natural Interaction
Used by:
Google
Tesla

Guided Learning

Break complex tasks into guided steps, adapting to user knowledge levels.

Adaptive & Intelligent Systems
Used by:
Figma
GitHub

Augmented Creation

Empower users to create content with AI as a collaborative partner.

Human-AI Collaboration
Used by:
Figma
GitHub

Responsible AI Design

Prioritize fairness, transparency, and accountability throughout AI lifecycle.

Trustworthy & Reliable AI
Used by:
Hugging
IBM
Microsoft

Error Recovery & Graceful Degradation

Fail gracefully with clear recovery paths when things go wrong.

Trustworthy & Reliable AI
Used by:
ChatGPT
GitHub
Grammarly

Collaborative AI

Enable effective collaboration between multiple users and AI within shared workflows.

Human-AI Collaboration
Used by:
Notion
Slack

Ambient Intelligence

Create unobtrusive AI that senses context and provides assistance without explicit interaction.

Adaptive & Intelligent Systems
Used by:
Apple
Google
Tesla

Safe Exploration

Provide sandbox environments for experimenting with AI without risk.

Trustworthy & Reliable AI
Used by:
GitHub
OpenAI
Photoshop

Predictive Anticipation

AI that predicts user needs before they're expressed, pre-loading content and suggesting next actions based on behavioral patterns.

Adaptive & Intelligent Systems
Used by:
Netflix
Spotify

Confidence Visualization

Display AI certainty levels through visual indicators, helping users understand prediction reliability and decide when to trust or verify outputs.

Trustworthy & Reliable AI
Used by:
AWS
GPTZero

Feedback Loops

Continuous learning mechanisms where user corrections and preferences improve AI performance, creating experiences that evolve with usage.

Human-AI Collaboration
Used by:
ChatGPT
Claude

Graceful Handoff

Seamless transitions between AI automation and human control.

Human-AI Collaboration
Used by:
Adobe
Tesla

Context Switching

Smooth transitions between tasks or topics while maintaining conversation continuity.

Natural Interaction
Used by:
ChatGPT
Notion

Intelligent Caching

Pre-fetch and cache AI content for instant results, reducing latency.

Performance & Efficiency
Used by:
GitHub
Midjourney

Progressive Enhancement

Provide immediate basic responses then progressively add detail and accuracy.

Performance & Efficiency
Used by:
Claude
Dall-E
Perplexity

Privacy-First Design

Minimize data collection and provide transparent privacy controls.

Privacy & Control
Used by:
DuckDuckGo

Selective Memory

Control what AI remembers, forgets, or ignores with transparent settings.

Privacy & Control
Used by:
Anthropic
ChatGPT

Universal Access Patterns

Ensure equitable access for all abilities, languages, and assistive technologies.

Accessibility & Inclusion
Used by:
Be
Microsoft

Crisis Detection & Escalation

Detect crisis signals and immediately provide professional resources.

Safety & Harm Prevention
Used by:
ChatGPT
Crisis
Woebot

Session Degradation Prevention

Strengthen safety checks during extended conversations with session limits.

Safety & Harm Prevention
Used by:
Wysa

Anti-Manipulation Safeguards

Detect actual harmful intent beyond surface framing regardless of how it's disguised

Safety & Harm Prevention
Used by:
Bing
ChatGPT
Claude

Vulnerable User Protection

Detect vulnerable users and apply graduated age, crisis, and dependency protections.

Safety & Harm Prevention
Used by:
Woebot

Autonomy Spectrum

Provide a spectrum of autonomy levels - from passive suggestions to full autonomy - that users can adjust per task type, enabling granular control over how independently an AI agent operates.

Human-AI Collaboration
Used by:
GitHub
Microsoft
Notion
+1

Intent Preview

Before any significant action, the agent presents a clear, scannable summary of what it intends to do - showing planned steps, reversibility status, and edit controls for user approval.

Human-AI Collaboration
Used by:
Claude
GitHub

Plan Summary

Provide a structured breakdown of the agent's reasoning and approach - showing goal interpretation, strategy, subtask checklist, and assumptions - so users can evaluate the plan before execution begins.

Trustworthy & Reliable AI
Used by:
ChatGPT
Claude
Devin
+1

Action Audit Trail

Provide a timestamped, structured log of every action the agent took - grouped by task, with reversibility status, selective undo, and diff views - so users can review and correct agent behavior after the fact.

Trustworthy & Reliable AI
Used by:
Claude
GitHub

Escalation Pathways

Design structured escalation triggers and handoff mechanisms so agents can pause and ask for human guidance when they encounter ambiguity, conflicts, or decisions beyond their authorization - without breaking workflow or losing context.

Human-AI Collaboration
Used by:

Trust Calibration

Design a system that progressively builds appropriate trust through demonstrated competence - showing track records per domain, celebrating milestones, and adjusting oversight based on actual agent performance.

Trustworthy & Reliable AI
Used by:
GitHub
Gmail
Spotify
+1

Mixed-Initiative Control

Design interaction models where control flows seamlessly between human and agent - supporting parallel work zones, interruptible agent activity, and natural handoffs without formal 'take over' actions.

Human-AI Collaboration
Used by:
ChatGPT
Figma

Agent Status & Monitoring

Design a layered status system with escalating attention demands - from ambient badges to glanceable progress panels to interrupting notifications - so users stay informed about agent activity without being forced to watch.

Performance & Efficiency
Used by:
ChatGPT
Devin
